title: CHSE Odisha 12th Result 2026 LIVE: Odisha +2 results to be out today at 12.30 pm, scorecards at results.odisha.gov.in
description: CHSE Odisha 12th Result 2026 LIVE: Odisha Board Class 12 results releasing today at orissaresults.nic.in at 12.30 pm. The Class 12 board results will be announced for all streams- Science, Commerce and Arts. Follow the blog for latest updates on results, direct link, how to check, pass percentage.
